creator: jhale@FreeBSD.org
text:
antoine: Do you want to run this again with the updated patch? Some of the i386 run got hung up on the graphics/libjxl patch weirdness recently fixed in [1]. The reported build problems are resolved, however.

[1] https://cgit.freebsd.org/ports/commit/?id=720153c0a65b699720056ed8f8f33a899bdb4357
